sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15202" key="*)arkto/xeir" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ἀρκτό-χειρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">χειρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n15202.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with bear's paws for hands,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:5:49" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.49</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
